suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Clarify when component-level tests and agent-browser manual verification are required vs. optional. Workers repeatedly skip both for simple presentational UI changes (toasts, banners, badges), causing claimed tests to be missing and no interactive verification evidence.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: F011-UI (zero tests initially), F013-UI (zero tests, zero agent-browser checks), F015-UI (zero agent-browser checks), F016-UI (zero tests). Handoffs justify skipping with 'relies on existing infrastructure' or 'no new tests needed'.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Explicitly require that fix features reference the original feature's commit and review file at the start of work, and verify that all original blocking issues are addressed before declaring completion.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: The prior F011-FIX review (round 2) incorrectly concluded no worker session, handoff, or commit existed, when all three were already present in the system. Better fix-feature procedure would prevent this kind of review failure.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add a 'Verify Existing Implementation' procedure step for tasks where the required code already exists from prior milestones. Current skill assumes all tasks require net-new implementation and TDD, which does not fit verification-only features like F017-BE.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: F017-BE commit contained no new source code because ConflictResolutionDialog integration was already implemented. The worker treated it as verification, which was correct, but the skill provides no guidance for this scenario.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Document the pattern for adding Tailwind keyframe animations when UI motion is needed, so workers don't extend tailwind.config.js inconsistently.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: F013-UI added slide-in-right/slide-out-right keyframes to tailwind.config.js. AGENTS.md UI section only says 'Use TailwindCSS for styling' with no animation guidance.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Provide guidance for testing database-backed functions when module-private db variables (kasDatabase.ts, bankDatabase.ts, gudangDatabase.ts pattern) make sql.js-backed unit testing difficult. Currently workers write shallow error-path/constant tests rather than real DB operation tests.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: F012-BE and F014-BE tests only exercise unknown-module guards and constant checks rather than UPDATE/SELECT assertions because sql.js db instances are module-private.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Document the expected IPC API extension pattern (electron.d.ts → preload.ts → main.ts → database.ts) so new workers can coordinate multi-file changes without rediscovering it each time.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: F011-FIX worker correctly propagated syncStatusFilter through all four layers, but this multi-file coordination pattern is not written down in AGENTS.md or architecture.md.

rejectedObservations.observation: Add a convention that sync_status should consistently use 'failed' everywhere instead of 'error'.
